rationale: Educ. Code §45.207 governs the process by which school districts award depository contracts to banks. It has no operative relationship to the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A school district shall award the depository contract to the bank that submits the highest bid or the highest-ranked proposal
_note: No conflict. §45.207 addresses depository contract procurement; the proposed homestead exemption increase does not alter any provision of this statute.
